description_long: This is a standard-sized aluminum beer can with a copper-brown base color and a glossy, wet appearance due to visible condensation droplets covering its surface. The main label features bold, curved stripes in red, green, and blue, sweeping diagonally across the front. Subtle text and graphics are visible on the sides, including nutritional information and a faint, stylized illustration. The top of the can is black with a metallic pull tab, typical of modern beverage cans. The can's surface is smooth and hard, with a reflective sheen that highlights the condensation. The overall design is vibrant and eye-catching, suitable for urban environments such as parks, sidewalks, or street corners.
description: A copper-brown aluminum beer can with colorful curved stripes and visible condensation droplets, featuring a glossy, wet finish.
description_view_0: Front view shows the bold red, green, and blue curved stripes prominently on the copper-brown background, with condensation droplets clearly visible.
description_view_1: This side view reveals faint text and graphics, including what appears to be nutritional information, and the top rim of the can is visible.
description_view_2: Another side view highlights additional text and graphics, including blue and red lettering, and the can's glossy, wet surface.
description_view_3: The back view displays a faint, stylized illustration and more subtle text, with the colorful stripes partially visible on the right edge.
attribute_graphic_design: The label features bold, curved stripes in red, green, and blue on a copper-brown background, with additional subtle text and faint illustrations. The overall style is modern and vibrant, with a glossy, wet finish due to condensation.
